title: bromelia humilis var. hemisphaerica
intro: Bromelia humilis var. hemisphaerica, also known as the dwarf pineapple or pinecone plant, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the bromeliad family. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Bromelia humilis var. hemisphaerica include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support digestive health. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea or infused oil, and it is also used in herbal preparations such as tinctures and salves to harness its medicinal properties.
